_meta.scope: All 68 name_chain + structural evidence-basis rows with assigned_tier in (branded_dso, stealth_dso)
_meta.method: Full evidence review: cross-referenced il_cluster_ownership_verified_20260530.json, gate owner reasoning text, NPPES NPI fields (parent_company, affiliated_dso, consumer_brand), evidence artifact URLs, DOL EBSA MEWA filing, DSO locator URLs, web verification (puredentalspa.com, dentaltownchicago.com). Web checks run for 4 borderline rows.
_meta.recommendation: 310 can be consolidated minus 11 rows (4 DOWNGRADE_TO_HOLD + 3 HOLD_PENDING_POLICY + 4 DOWNGRADE_TO_T3). Effective merge-ready DSO tranche from these 68 is 57 rows. KEEP_WITH_URL_FIX row (HUSSAIN_SAMEERA) is merge-eligible after URL cleanup.

rows.rationale: Dental Dreams classification well-supported: entity_classification=dso_national in DB, affiliated_dso='Dental Dreams', shared AO with 9 other confirmed Dental Dreams locations. Two evidence_urls entries are prose strings — must be reformatted or moved to evidence_artifacts before the hardened validator accepts them.
rows.note: URL fix required: evidence_urls entries must be durable https:// URLs, not prose descriptions.

rows.rationale: DOL EBSA MEWA federal benefit plan filing (index 10741) cross-validates all 12 DentalWorks IL friendly-PC entities under one shared multi-employer welfare plan — a federal legal artifact, not a name pattern. Despite 'name_chain' basis label, evidence is structural.
rows.note: FLAG: 11 rows are in the DentalWorks/NITTINGER protected network. Confirm gate owner's release was formally documented (reasoning text comment alone is not a formal release record).

rows.practice_name: D2 DENTAL AT OAK STREET, P.C.
rows.rationale: Shared corporate mailing 137 N Oak Park Ave Ste 200 Oak Park IL (L2 Management HQ) confirmed across D2 Dental of Illinois/Michigan/Ohio NPIs via OpenNPI. ProSmile acquisition of Destiny Dental confirmed via Livingston Partners and ProSmile press releases. 'D2 DENTAL' in the independent list refers to a distinct naming pattern; these entities tie to L2 Management by mailing address, not merely brand name.
rows.note: SEPARATE ISSUE: 7 LABINOV rows have operating-status holds per PM handoff. Tier is correct; operating status is a distinct question handled by the denominator audit.

Medium confidence, gate owner's own reasoning labeled 'verdict=unresolved'. Evidence is an indirect phone-number coincidence linking North Ave. Dental Partners to a former Tru Family Dental address (Tru acquired by Heartland 2020) — no direct NPPES parent_company, no direct locator match, no documented platform-level structure. Should not be in the ready-to-validate file at medium confidence / unresolved gate-owner verdict.

Web verification confirms Pure Dental Spa is dentist-owned by Dr. Rajul Patel DDS (founded 2010; VoyageChicago interview, RocketReach 'Dentist and Owner'). Live website (puredentalspa.com) discloses zero DSO, management company, MSO, or PE investor. Non-dentist AO (Revenue Cycle Manager, Crystal Barron) reflects only a billing admin role. Multiple associate doctors (Dr. Patankar, Dr. Toth) are employees, not an MSO layer. Classification should be T3 dentist_multi, not T5 branded_dso.
rows.web_check: puredentalspa.com: © 2026 Pure Dental Spa, no management company, no DSO affiliation, no investor disclosed. VoyageChicago/RocketReach confirm Dr. Rajul Patel as Dentist and Owner. Crunchbase profile exists but no funding rounds surfaced.
